chapters.zh: 作长老的写信给蒙拣选的太太（或作：教会；下同），和他的儿女，就是我诚心所爱的；不但我爱，也是一切知道真理之人所爱的。
chapters.en: The elder unto the elect lady and her children, whom I love in the truth; and not I only, but also all they that have known the truth;

chapters.zh: 爱你们是为真理的缘故，这真理存在我们里面，也必永远与我们同在。
chapters.en: For the truth's sake, which dwelleth in us, and shall be with us for ever.

chapters.zh: 恩惠，怜悯，平安从父神和他儿子耶稣基督在真理和爱心上必常与我们同在！
chapters.en: Grace be with you, mercy, peace, from God the Father, and from the Lord Jesus Christ, the Son of the Father, in truth and love.

chapters.zh: 我见你的儿女，有照我们从父所受之命令遵行真理的，就甚欢喜。
chapters.en: I rejoiced greatly that I found of thy children walking in truth, as we have received a commandment from the Father.

chapters.zh: 太太阿，我现在劝你，我们大家要彼此相爱。这并不是我写一条新命令给你，乃是我们从起初所受的命令。
chapters.en: And now I beseech thee, lady, not as though I wrote a new commandment unto thee, but that which we had from the beginning, that we love one another.

chapters.zh: 我们若照他的命令行，这就是爱。你们从起初所听见当行的，就是这命令。
chapters.en: And this is love, that we walk after his commandments. This is the commandment, That, as ye have heard from the beginning, ye should walk in it.

chapters.zh: 因为世上有许多迷惑人的出来，他们不认耶稣基督是成了肉身来的；这就是那迷惑人、敌基督的。
chapters.en: For many deceivers are entered into the world, who confess not that Jesus Christ is come in the flesh. This is a deceiver and an antichrist.

chapters.zh: 你们要小心，不要失去你们（有古卷：我们）所做的工，乃要得著满足的赏赐。
chapters.en: Look to yourselves, that we lose not those things which we have wrought, but that we receive a full reward.

chapters.zh: 凡越过基督的教训、不常守著的，就没有神；常守这教训的，就有父又有子。
chapters.en: Whosoever transgresseth, and abideth not in the doctrine of Christ, hath not God. He that abideth in the doctrine of Christ, he hath both the Father and the Son.

chapters.zh: 若有人到你们那里，不是传这教训，不要接他到家里，也不要问他的安；
chapters.en: If there come any unto you, and bring not this doctrine, receive him not into house, neither bid him God speed:

chapters.zh: 因为问他安的，就在他的恶行上有分。
chapters.en: For he that biddeth him God speed is partaker of his evil deeds.

chapters.zh: 我还有许多事要写给你们，却不愿意用纸墨写出来，但盼望到你们那里，与你们当面谈论，使你们的喜乐满足。
chapters.en: Having many things to write unto you, I would not with paper and ink: but I trust to come unto you, and speak face to face, that our joy may be full.

chapters.zh: 你那蒙拣选之姊妹的儿女都问你安。
chapters.en: The children of thy elect sister greet thee. Amen.
